claim: Founder enables ordinary humans to produce stronger deployed software than an ordinary vibe-coding workflow while requiring less supervision and exposing no developer machinery.

source_question.title: We can all vibe code. Why bother?
source_question.interpreted_thesis: When software creation is easy enough, people can make their own point solutions instead of buying or learning a developer workflow.

study.participant_eligibility: No professional software-development employment and no routine use of Git, issue trackers, terminals, CI, deployment consoles, or agent orchestration.

truth_boundary: Passing repository tests proves only that the comparison protocol fails closed. Founder superiority may be claimed only from matched real-user runs, raw evidence digests, blinded evaluation, and independent admission.
